api: GitLab REST API v4 (official OpenAPI v2)
scope: Full GitLab OpenAPI parity scaffold. All non-deprecated official GitLab REST operations are covered by existing streams/direct reads, operation-backed read/binary/HEAD commands, or typed reverse-ETL write actions. Operation-backed read commands remain feature-gated until their executor exists; generated writes remain gated by reverse ETL plan, preview, approval, execute. Deprecated operations remain blocked-by-default operation-ledger rows. The /users compatibility stream row is retained because the current OpenAPI snapshot omits GET /users.

operation.reason: deprecated operation in the official GitLab OpenAPI surface; blocked until a supported replacement is selected
